subcodes.first_line: O thou who journeyest to the verdant meadows of utterance, who ascendest unto the kingdom of certitude, and who dwellest in paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ایها المتسافر الی رفرف البیان و المتصاعد الی ملکوت الایقان و الساکن فی فردوس
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God, @nearness and remoteness
